label: BLOCKED BY MISSING ACCESS
completedSourceWork: Discord community/clan safe setup commands added
Guild snapshot, preview and rollback artifacts added
Language and ping role picker fallback added
Website login/recovery copy supports username or email
Forgot-password no longer redirects with login/email in URL

liveBlocker.reason: Render deployment of commit 215ce1a failed because fima-macro-db is expired/suspended. Live backend remains old, /account remains 404, /api/license/validate remains HTTP 500, and login is not fixed live.

releaseDecision.criticalBlocker: Production database must be restored/upgraded so backend commit 215ce1a or newer can deploy and entitlement/login runtime tests can run.
